name: 5番線おじさん救出編 Platform 5 Dungeons
developer: MFC STUDIO, KOSEI YASUDA, SHINISE GAMES
short_description: The long-awaited sequel to Japan’s hit “Nibansen” is here! This new rescue-horror in the “Bansen Series” goes beyond anomaly hunting. Enter massive Senjuku Station (千宿), full of oddities, and save the stranded old man. Now the truth of “Nibansen,” “Sanbansen,” and “Platform 4” is revealed…
detailed_description:
• This is NOT an “Exit 8-like”!
    A game where you must escape a station teeming with anomalies!

  • At long last, from the immensely popular Japanese anomaly-hunting series “2番線 | Nibansen,” “3番線 | Sanbansen,” “4番線 | Platform 4”—collectively known as the “Bansen Series”—comes the very first story-driven horror game!
    Even if you’re new and start with this title, you can still fully enjoy the story and immerse yourself in this world!

  • The mystery behind the beloved character “Ojisan,” the “mysterious object,” and the “anomalous phenomena” is about to be revealed…!

  • The setting is Chijuku Station—a complex station so labyrinthine it’s nicknamed the “Chijuku Dungeon.”
    When an “anomalous phenomenon” occurs and an evacuation order is issued, the protagonist, a member of a rescue team, goes in to save Ojisan, who has been left behind all alone…

  • [Please Note]

    • We request your cooperation in picking up trash throughout the day at this station. If you see any trash, please pick it up right away and use it as a weapon. Thank you for your help.

    • If you encounter anything suspicious within the station, run away immediately.

    • Please search for Ojisan.

    • Earn Ojisan’s trust.

  • [Estimated Playtime]
    1–2 hours

  • [Video Posting Guidelines]
    We wholeheartedly welcome any video uploads.
    We’re happy if more people learn about the game and have fun playing it.
    Hence, you are free to livestream or do commentary on any MFC STUDIO game.

  • [A Word from the Creator]
    This is my last project before graduating from university. I will be taking a temporary break from game development after I graduate, so I hope you enjoy this final work.

supported_languages:
English, Japanese*, German, Traditional Chinese, Korean
*languages with full audio support
